user_scenarios.user_goal: As an ai_infra wiki maintainer, verify that domestic accelerator source profiles and PDF evidence are crawled into durable raw evidence.
prerequisites: The domestic accelerator crawl has run under harness rules.
The personal-wiki ai_infra raw crawler evidence area exists.
steps: Confirm at least one domestic accelerator profile succeeded.
Confirm each successful source has raw evidence under personal-wiki/domains/ai_infra/raw/crawler/.
Inspect PDF-backed captures when present and confirm the markdown raw capture references a saved PDF attachment.
expected_outcomes: Every succeeded manifest entry includes an existing raw crawler path.
PDF-backed captures preserve both markdown text evidence and the original PDF attachment.
Failed and skipped-disabled manifest entries include diagnostic source IDs and reason or error fields.
failure_signals: The manifest is missing or invalid JSON.
The succeeded count is below the required threshold.
A succeeded source has no raw path or references a missing file.
A PDF source only stores mojibake text without preserving the PDF attachment.
A failed or skipped-disabled entry lacks source_id, error, or reason details.
cleanup: Remove .codex/accelerator-crawl/compute-accelerator-domestic-crawl-01/ if a clean rerun is needed.
